commit.subject: LU-12905 tests: wrappers for createmany and unlinkmany
commit.message:
LU-12905 tests: wrappers for createmany and unlinkmany

which set debug=0 if number of operations is high enough.
this is to speedup testing.

Change-Id: I89e9df65f9251ecd1f4996ca597e5fc294525aa8
Test-Parameters: fortestonly testlist=sanity
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
